meta.title: MathSpark — Parent Intelligence Report System
meta.description: Templates and rules that power personalised weekly/monthly parent reports showing strengths, weaknesses, specific mistakes, and what to do next.

sections.title: 💪 Strengths — What {childName} is Great At
narrativeTemplates: {childName} is doing brilliantly in {topic}! {accuracy}% accuracy across {count} questions. Keep it up! 🌟
Really strong performance in {topic}. {childName} got {correct}/{total} right. This is exam-ready!

sections.title: 🎯 Areas to Strengthen
narrativeTemplates: {topic} needs a bit more practice — {childName} scored {accuracy}%. We recommend {recommendation}.
In {topic}, {childName} is at {accuracy}%. This is totally fixable with focused practice. Try the '{drillName}' skill drill!
sections.toneGuide: NEVER shame. ALWAYS frame as 'not yet' rather than 'can't'. Use encouraging language.

sections.title: 🔍 Mistakes to Watch For
sections.description: Specific error patterns detected in this period's work
narrativeTemplates: We noticed {childName} tends to {mistakeDescription}. This happened {count} times this {period}. Here's how to fix it: {fix}
A common error we spotted: {mistakeName}. This is one of the most frequent mistakes in {topic}. The fix is simple: {fix}
sections.toneGuide: Frame mistakes as learning opportunities. 'We noticed' not 'your child failed'. Always include the fix.

templates.text: Practice the '{drillName}' drill to fix the {mistakeName} mistake. Just 5 minutes a day!
Spend 10 minutes on '{topic}' flashcards. {childName} is close to mastering this!
{childName} is ready for a challenge! Try the Level {nextLevel} {topic} drill.
Keep up the great work in {topic}! A quick 5-minute review this week will keep it sharp.

sections.title: 📈 Progress Over Time
sections.description: Accuracy trend over the last 4 weeks/months

sections.title: 🗺️ Topic Mastery Map
sections.description: Visual showing mastery level across all topics

sections.title: 🎓 Exam Readiness Score
sections.description: How ready is {childName} for the IPM exam?

scoring.formula: weighted average of topic accuracies × practice consistency × mistake reduction

labels.75-89: 💪 Almost there. Focus on weak spots.
labels.0-39: 🌱 Early stages. Daily practice will make a big difference.

fields.label: Questions Where You Ran Out of Time
Questions You Should Have Left Blank

principles: Never shame or compare unfavourably to other children
Frame weaknesses as 'not yet mastered' not 'failing'
Always include at least 2 strengths before any weakness
Every weakness mention includes a specific, achievable fix
Use the child's name — it's personal, not generic
End on a positive note with encouragement
narrativeRules.parentLanguage: Simple English, no jargon. Assume the parent is not a math teacher.
sparkyClosing: Keep going, {childName}! You're getting better every day! 🚀
{childName} is on a great path. A little practice each day goes a long way! 🌟
Great effort this {period}, {childName}! Sparky is proud of you! 💪
Remember: every mistake is just a step towards getting it right. Keep it up! 🎯
